news.summary: A reputable brand, CRN®, part of The Channel Company, has announced the inclusion of 10Pearls in its esteemed 2025 CRN Solution Provider 500 list, highlighting the company as one of the premier IT solution providers in North America. This annual list showcases the top revenue-generating solution providers in the region and is a recognized benchmark for leading IT service firms. The collective revenue of the companies on the list amounts to $548.9 billion, solidifying their status as influential players in the industry.
news.headline: 10Pearls listed on 2025 CRN Solution Provider 500 list for North America's top IT solution providers with $548.9B total revenue.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, in Springfield, Missouri, Tom Douglas from JMARK has acquired a minority stake in Mostly Serious. This investment strengthens a partnership aimed at providing AI training and consulting services to the region, building upon their collaboration. The move signifies a formalized alliance between the two companies and indicates the commitment to expanding their presence in the AI sector.
news.headline: Tom Douglas of JMARK becomes minority investor in Mostly Serious in Springfield. This investment enhances AI services in the area.

news.summary: Analysis of plasma proteins has identified key characteristics of treatment resistance in non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC), leading to the development of personalized immunotherapy strategies. The study was conducted jointly in Binyamina, Israel, and Cary, North Carolina. The findings, released on May 30, 2025, by OncoHost, a company focused on advancing precision oncology, have significant implications for tailored treatment approaches. This research highlights the potential of utilizing proteomics to create more effective therapies for NSCLC patients.
news.headline: OncoHost's study uncovers resistance mechanisms in lung cancer patients on immunotherapy. Plasma proteomics analysis crucial for personalized strategies.

news.summary: Charlotte, North Carolina - Belk has revealed the upcoming Charity Sale event, set to take place from June 6-8, 2025. During this period, customers can enjoy special discounts on a wide range of top national brands available at the store, including products that are typically not marked down. This event is part of Belk's initiative to give back to the community and support charitable causes.
news.headline: Belk's Charity Sale offers exclusive discounts on national brands from June 6-8, benefiting a cause.

news.summary: Honolulu-based company Barnwell Industries, Inc. (NYSE American: BRN) disclosed that its 2025 Annual Meeting of Shareholders, initially scheduled for May 29, 2025, has been postponed to June 2, 2025. The meeting adjournment was announced recently.
news.headline: Barnwell adjourns 2025 meeting due to Sherwood's refusal, rescheduled for June 2, 2025. Shareholders' votes not submitted.

news.summary: In San Francisco on May 30, 2025, it was reported that consumers are losing billions of dollars annually to financial scams, as revealed by the Federal Trade Commission. Addressing this issue, Rightful Returns Group, a reputable company focusing on financial asset recovery, has recently unveiled a straightforward and effective approach to combat this problem.
news.headline: Rightful Returns Group introduces checklist to safeguard consumers from fraud as FTC reports billions lost annually.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, in Houston, ImmunoGenesis introduced IMGS-001, the initial dual-specific PD-L1/PD-L2 antibody with cytotoxic killing capabilities. This innovative treatment targets "immune-excluded" cancers that are not responsive to current immunotherapies. ImmunoGenesis, a clinical-stage biotech firm, is pioneering this groundbreaking antibody to address the challenges posed by resistant cancers.
news.headline: ImmunoGenesis will present IMGS-001 Phase 1a/1b study updates at ASCO 2025. IMGS-001 is dual-specific PD-L1/PD-L2 antibody for resistant cancers.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, a new platform called From Where was launched in Los Angeles. This platform aims to assist short-term rental hosts in making money from their design skills by creating personalized digital storefronts for hosts and property owners for free. Through this service, guests can access unique rental spaces designed by hosts, ultimately enhancing the rental experience.
news.headline: From Where launches platform to help short-term rental hosts monetize design sensibilities. Personalized digital storefronts at no charge.

news.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. and Sanofi SA reported results from two Phase 3 trials of itepekimab in COPD patients. The AERIFY-1 trial showed a 27% reduction in moderate or severe acute exacerbations compared to placebo at week 52, a significant benefit for former smokers with COPD. However, the AERIFY-2 trial did not meet the primary endpoint of reducing exacerbations. Patients were randomized to receive itepekimab every two weeks or four weeks or placebo in addition to standard-of-care therapy. AERIFY-1 had 375 patients in each group, while AERIFY-2 had 326, 303, and 324 patients in the respective groups.
news.headline: Regeneron, Sanofi's COPD drug itepekimab reduces exacerbations by 27% in former smokers, but second trial fails to meet primary endpoint.

news.summary: The Federal Reserve's key inflation rate is expected to drop to its lowest point since March 2021, potentially hitting a four-year low. Simultaneously, S&P 500 futures are indicating a stagnant market trend.
news.headline: Federal Reserve inflation rate may hit 4-year low, lowest since March 2021; S&P 500 futures remain flat.

news.summary: In Bonita Springs, Florida and Baton Rouge, Louisiana, Herc Holdings Inc. (NYSE: HRI) and H&E Equipment Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: HEES) declared the conclusion of a tender offer. The offer involved exchanging every existing share of H&E common stock (referred to as "H&E Shares") for $78.75 in cash and 0.1287 shares of Herc common stock, without interest. This deal expired today after being announced, providing the shareholders the "Offer Price" as consideration.
news.headline: Herc Holdings and H&E Equipment Services conclude tender offer to acquire H&E Equipment Services shares for $78.75 in cash and 0.1287 shares of Herc common stock.

news.summary: A new report titled "Data Center Power Market Landscape 2025-2030" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. According to the report, the Data Center Power Market reached a value of USD 33.15 Billion in 2024 and is forecasted to grow to USD 75.24 Billion by 2030, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 14.64%. The market in the Americas region, particularly in the U.S., Canada, and Brazil, holds a dominant position, with the U.S. contributing to over 52% of the global market share for data center power. The report highlights the significant growth opportunities in this sector.
news.headline: Report analyzes Data Center Power Market landscape for 2025-2030, valued at $33.15B in 2024, projected to reach $75.24B by 2030, growing at CAGR of 14.64%. U.S., Canada, and Brazil dominate market, U.S. alone contributes over 52% of global market share. Key power infrastructure providers include ABB, Caterpillar, Cummins, Eaton, Legrand, Rolls-Royce, Schneider Electric, and Vertiv.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, Voxtur Analytics Corp. (TSXV: VXTR; OTCQB: VXTRF), a North American technology company focused on enhancing transparency in the real estate lending sector, released its financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. The company reported a revenue of $8.31 million, down from $11.91 million in the same period in 2024. The gross profit for the quarter was $4.98 million, lower than the $7.94 million generated in Q1 2024. The gross profit margin stood at 60%. The Unaudited Condensed Interim Consolidated Financial Statements and Management's Discussion and Analysis for this period can be accessed on www.sedarplus.ca and www.voxtur.com. Additional details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Voxtur announces Q1 2025 financial results: Revenue $8,310 (down from $11,909 in 2024), Gross Profit $4,981 (down from $7,940 in 2024).

news.summary: The Trump administration, through Director Bo Hines of President Trump's Digital Assets Council, is planning to include Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) in its long-term market infrastructure strategy. Hines revealed at the Bitcoin 2025 conference that they are exploring a strategic Bitcoin reserve to be part of the government's asset mix, similar to traditional commodities like gold. By doing so, they aim to benefit the American people through an accumulation strategy. This suggests that a potential second Trump presidency would officially incorporate Bitcoin into the country's economic planning, marking a significant move towards embracing cryptocurrency. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Trump Administration considering including Bitcoin in US market infrastructure strategy with a strategic Bitcoin reserve. Director Hines confirms administration exploring this move at Bitcoin 2025 conference. Clearest sign of formal Bitcoin integration in national economic planning under a second Trump presidency.

news.summary: The most recent AI model from DeepSeek has identified Xinjiang camps as human rights violations, but has avoided directly criticizing China. This has sparked worries about inconsistencies and a rise in censorship.
news.headline: AI dev criticizes DeepSeek's new model for limiting free speech, flags Xinjiang camps as human rights abuses but censors China criticism, sparking worries over contradictions & rise in censorship.

news.summary: Lone Wolf Ranch Pets™, a company founded by Chuck Norris, introduced a new dog food on May 30, 2025. The protein-rich, air-dried food is made with ranch-raised beef, organ meats, and superfoods. It aims to support strong muscles, healthy digestion, and vitality in dogs. This product is designed to provide essential nutrients for overall canine health.
news.headline: Chuck Norris launches Power Foods Complete dog food with ranch-raised beef, organ meats, and superfoods for healthy dogs.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, on May 30, 2025, the renowned "Peanut Factory Lofts" has achieved a complete sell-out, garnering a substantial $18,679,418 from accredited investors. Cove Capital Investments, LLC, a DST sponsor firm catering to accredited investors to engage in debt-free investments, facilitated this successful venture.
news.headline: Cove Capital fully subscribes $19 million San Antonio DST, sells out Peanut Factory Lofts with $18.7 million from investors.

news.summary: Before the market opens on Monday, June 2, Campbell's Company (NASDAQ: CPB) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings. Analysts predict earnings to be 66 cents per share, down from 75 cents per share a year ago, with expected revenue of $2.43 billion, an increase from $2.37 billion in the previous year. Piper Sandler analyst Michael Lavery maintained an Overweight rating on Campbell's on May 23, adjusting the price target from $45 to $42. With an annual dividend yield of 4.57%, some investors are anticipating gains from dividends as well. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Campbell's stock Q3 earnings expect 66 cents/share, revenue $2.43 billion. Analysts, dividends $500/month opportunity.

news.summary: A recent report on the Electric Vehicle and Charging Infrastructure Market in South Africa predicts a 26.3% annual growth, with the market expected to reach US$471.3 million by 2025. This report covers 50+ Key Performance Indicators, including EV market size by value and volume, vehicle type, price point, propulsion type, and location. The data reflects a positive outlook for investment opportunities in this sector.
news.headline: South Africa EV market to grow by 26.3% annually, reaching US$471.3 million in 2025. Report by ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.summary: Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE: WFC) recently announced a definitive agreement to sell its rail equipment leasing division's assets to a newly established joint venture between GATX Corporation (NYSE: GATX) and Brookfield Infrastructure Partners LP (NYSE: BIP) for $4.4 billion. As part of the deal, the joint venture will purchase approximately 105,000 railcars from Wells Fargo. Initially, GATX will hold a 30% ownership stake in the joint venture, with Brookfield Infrastructure owning the remaining 70%. However, GATX has the option to acquire full ownership in the future. The transaction is expected to be finalized soon.
news.headline: Wells Fargo sells rail leasing assets for $4.4 billion to GATX and Brookfield in joint venture. 105,000 railcars involved.
